content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

The changes correctly implement fail-closed behavior for try_reconcile_success when workflow_run_id is missing. The approach is sound: (1) engine functions now return the authoritative run_id from dispatch instead of reading the journal, (2) persist_workflow_run_id uses this captured run_id instead of the unsafe latest-RunStarted fallback, (3) task_for_success_reconciliation re-reads the task from disk after persistence to verify the binding is durable, (4) try_reconcile_success fails closed and transitions the milestone controller to NeedsOperator when the durable binding is absent. Two new tests cover the no-binding and failed-persistence paths. Clippy is clean, fmt passes. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
